title: Tunneler Enchantment
description: An enchantment datapack that adds a tunneler enchant.
body:
# 🛠️ Tunneler Enchantment Datapack (1.21.5)
This datapack adds a custom enchantment called Tunneler, designed to enhance mining tools with progressively powerful effects.

## ✨ Features
🔨 Custom Enchantment: thenewlife_enchants:tunneler

📈 Level-Based Functionality: Each level exponentially makes a large hole.

🧩 Not OP: Tools with Tunneler take more damage per use

⚙️ Fully 1.21.5-Compatible

📦 Installation
Drop into your world’s datapacks/ folder
## Server Hosting (ad)
